g.text: Integer Overflow Scenario: Why INT8×INT8 Requires INT32 Accumulation

text.tspan: Quantized inference MUST use INT32 as the accumulation
datatype because the product of two INT8 values requires
up to 16 bits, and summing K such products requires even more.
This is why frameworks like TensorFlow Lite and ONNX Runtime
use int32_t for their quantized GEMM kernels.
void qgemm(int8_t* A, int8_t* B, int8_t* C,
int M, int N, int K,
// Requantize: scale down to INT8 range
